title: CostPerServingCalculatorInput
description: Schema describing inputs and outputs for cost-per-serving calculations in SSA Planning Graph.

calculatorId.description: Optional ID for this calculator run, for analytics and debugging.

version.description: Semantic version of the calculator schema/logic, e.g. '1.0.0'.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code such as USD.

householdProfileId.description: Optional reference to the household profile in SSA, for Planning Graph wiring.

items.description: Items whose cost per serving should be calculated.

id.description: Stable ID so results can be merged back into inventory or recipes.

name.description: Human readable name of the item (e.g., 'Brown Rice 5 lb bag').

packagePrice.description: Total price paid for one package, in the selected currency.

packageSize.description: Numeric size of the package (e.g., 80 for 80 oz).

servingsFromPackage.description: How many servings you expect to get from one package.

preferredServingSize.description: Optional: household default serving size quantity.

storeId.description: Optional reference to store/source (Sam's, Aldi, etc.).

onSale.description: Flag indicating whether this price is a sale/promo price.

notes.description: Free-form notes for the user or import pipeline.

meta.description: Extension bucket for downstream calculators or imports.

pricePerUnit.description: Computed price per base unit (normalized to smallest consistent unit).

pricePerServing.description: Computed price per serving for this item.

currency.description: Currency actually used when this item was priced (may override top-level).

source.description: Details about where this row came from (scan, manual entry, import).

refId.description: Any external reference ID, like UPC, circular row ID, etc.

summary.description: Optional summary object to be filled by the shim after computation.

totalSpending.description: Sum of packagePrice across all items.

avgPricePerServing.description: Weighted average price per serving across all items.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when this calculation was produced.
